title: Study in French - Canada.ca
content:
There are different types of schools and institutions in Canada.
Visit the French-language education in Canada website to learn more about schools and institutions at all levels in every province and territory that offers courses in French.
The Association des collèges et universités de la francophonie canadienne has information on university programs in French or in both official languages.
Are you a foreign national interested in studying in Canada? Learn more about studying in Canada , including:
- which Canadian schools can host international students;
- how to get a study permit; and
- what options you have for working while you study or after you graduate.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
